description:
Implements the bl-b58a observability resolution folded into docs/architecture.md (§1/§4/§6/§14/§15).

Replace the per-op-phase stderr-capture (bl-5d56's invented clones/<enc>/logs/<name>/<op>-<phase>.log) with ONE unified per-clone log:

- clones/<pct-enc-local-path>/log — JSON-lines, one object per line {ts,lvl,src,op,phase,msg}; src in {core,<plugin>}. Local, gitignored, never committed (consistent with binding.toml).
- Core EMITS lifecycle lines (claim/invoke/seal/close/abort). On a non-zero plugin exit core emits an error line (op/phase/plugin/exit) so failure locus survives any threshold.
- Plugin stays DUMB: writes raw stderr; balls pipes child stderr and envelopes each line as JSON with src=<plugin>+op/phase, lvl=info. So plugin.rs::open_log changes from .stderr(file) fd-redirect to piping ChildStderr + a relay loop. Handle a non-newline-terminated trailing blob (read-to-EOF as one line).
- log_level config: serde-default scalar (default "info"), §4 read order CLI flag -> XDG config.toml -> landing config/balls.toml -> serde fallback. Single threshold gates BOTH file persistence and terminal. --log-level CLI flag is layer 1. Default mapping: mutating-op lifecycle at info, read-op narration (list/show/ready) at debug so default-info keeps them out; plugin stderr at info.
- DELETE dead layout::log() + its test/doc-comment (logs/<name>/plugin.log, no live callers).
- Metrics: NO core surface — a query over this log (every op/phase/plugin event timestamped) or a *.post plugin to its own territory.

Concurrency: one JSON object per line, O_APPEND atomic for sub-PIPE_BUF writes (several agents run in parallel).

100% coverage + 300-line cap apply. Resolves the code half of bl-b58a (design half folds into docs/architecture.md under bl-b58a itself).
title: Greenfield observability: unified per-clone JSON-lines log (clones/<enc>/log)
